name: Voice Clone (TTS + RVC)
description: Generates speech with F5-TTS and applies RVC voice conversion for high-fidelity voice cloning. Two-stage pipeline: F5TTSEngineNode+UnifiedTTSTextNode generate base speech, then RVCEngineNode+UnifiedVoiceChangerNode convert it toward a target reference voice. Requires TTS-Audio-Suite with RVC support.

models.rvc: RVC voice handled via a target reference voice (CharacterVoicesNode). This TTS-Audio-Suite build exposes no input that consumes LoadRVCModelNode's RVC_MODEL output, so pretrained .pth selection is on the engine auto-download path, not wired into the graph.

parameter_notes.text: Text to speak. Supports unlimited length with smart chunking. Maps to UnifiedTTSTextNode.text.
parameter_notes.model: F5-TTS language/model variant for base speech (F5TTSEngineNode.language). Default F5TTS_v1_Base.
parameter_notes.voice_reference: Source voice for F5-TTS base generation (CharacterVoicesNode.voice_name). A voice file under voices_examples/ or models/voices/ with a matching .txt transcript.
parameter_notes.rvc_model: RVC target voice (CharacterVoicesNode.voice_name feeding UnifiedVoiceChangerNode.narrator_target). The converted speech is steered toward this reference voice. NOTE: this suite build has no input consuming LoadRVCModelNode's RVC_MODEL output, so a pretrained .pth is not wired in; pass a target reference voice name here instead.
parameter_notes.pitch_shift: Pitch adjustment in semitones for RVCEngineNode.pitch (range -14..14). 0 = no change, +12 = one octave up, -12 = one octave down.
